reviews.review_description: Worked the first time but then it only opens in Google cardboard form. How do I get a refund

reviews.review_title: I liked it, but needs polish
reviews.review_description: The ship handles well, easy enough to play the shooter style of game play. But the puzzles get very difficult too early in the game. Level 2 is frustratingly difficult as compared to level 1. Still, if you can handle the repetition of multiple attempts to solve the puzzle, it was fun and had a great concept. I gave up and didn't play again after spending 2 days trying to pass level 2.
Game Has great graphics Gun Jack is good but this advance more into detail and put you more into the game really fun worth the buy.
One of the best experiences I saw in this store
About what I would expect from a free cardboard demo, just with nicer graphics. Sound cut out entirely at one point and never came back on, game is now silent.

developer_response.body: Gamepad support was added in updated version.

reviews.review_title: Works just great on the GO
reviews.review_description: Graphics pretty good   great 3D effect. It seems you are on a rail run some of the time. The levels are not easy  but who wants easy  I find it very addictive personally. Very good value for money
Game is definitely worth the cost. Smooth dynamic gameplay, nice atmosphere and graphics. Can't understand those haters' reviews. Haters gonna hate, lol.
